name: Birthday Bash
description: The party as arrived with Birthday Bash. Help us celebrate a year of Lost Islands
biography: Birthday Bash is a birthday counterpart of Bash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He represents the Lost Islands first anniversary.
quote: The party as arrived with Birthday Bash. Help us celebrate a year of Lost Islands
personality: Birthday Bash's personality is not explicitly detailed, but he serves as a celebratory figure for the anniversary of Lost Islands.

story.content: Birthday Bash is a birthday counterpart of Bash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He represents the Lost Islands first anniversary.

content: The party as arrived with Birthday Bash. Help us celebrate a year of Lost Islands

trivia: He along with Surfer Slam Bam are the only Alter Ego Skylanders to have original artwork for Lost Islands.
His name is a play on the real term 'birthday bash', which is a birthday party.
Although Birthday Bash was supposed to represent the Lost Islands' first anniversary. Lost Islands actually was first released on October 6th 2012.
Birthday Bash is the first Lost Islands exclusive alter ego to be in the Earth Element.
There is also an arena Challenge in Skylanders: Giants called 'Birthday Bash'.
His name is shared by Birthday Bash Big Bubble Pop Fizz.
gameplay: Birthday Bash is a birthday counterpart of Bash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He represents the Lost Islands first anniversary.
